differential_diagnoses: Hypersensitivity pneumonitis with severe secondary pulmonary hypertension
next_steps: Genetic testing for EIF2AK4 mutations (associated with heritable PVOD/PCH)
Immediate weaning of intravenous epoprostenol due to risk of pulmonary edema
Right heart catheterization with fluid challenge (cautious) to re-evaluate pulmonary capillary wedge pressure
Transbronchial or surgical lung biopsy (only if risk-benefit is acceptable)
Evaluation for bridge to transplant with extracorporeal membrane oxygenation (ECMO) if hemodynamic instability progresses
Immediate weaning or cessation of intravenous epoprostenol to prevent further pulmonary edema
Cerebral imaging and comprehensive malignancy workup to evaluate for underlying metastatic disease or PTTM
Evaluation for veno-venous or veno-arterial ECMO as a bridge to transplantation
Careful reassessment of vaping history and toxicological exposures
